ValidationRule.description: Blocks won Opportunities when Close Date is blank or outside the current calendar quarter.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( IsWon, OR( ISBLANK(CloseDate), CloseDate < DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), (FLOOR((MONTH(TODAY()) - 1) / 3) * 3) + 1, 1), CloseDate >= ADDMONTHS(DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), (FLOOR((MONTH(TODAY()) - 1) / 3) * 3) + 1, 1), 3) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 成交前必須填寫結案日期，且結案日期必須落在本季內。
